name: DeadlocksStackingForPyanadon
title: Deadlock's Stacking for Pyanodon
author: Chrisdec
description: Adds stacking for intermediate products introduced in Pyanodons Coal Processing, Pyanodons Fusion Energy, Pyanodons HighTech, Pyanodons Raw Ores, Py Petroleum Handling, Pyanodons Alien Life and Pyanodons Alternative Energy.
